attribution.name: PlayfulProcess
attribution.note: Meta grammar mapping the constellation of kids content on recursive.eco.

name: Kids Constellation: Stories, Storyboards & Media
description: A map of maps for the children's channel. 64 grammars of stories, mythology, storyboards, and media. From PlayfulProcess originals (Shiryo, Story Tree, Alice chapter books) to public domain classics (Pinocchio, Peter Pan, world mythology) to curated video playlists (PBS Kids, Art with Mati and Dada). Each item is a doorway into a full grammar.
